title: Xylophone for Kids, Wooden Child Musical Instrument Musical Toys, Rainbow Kids Glockenspiel Educational Children Toy, Percussion for Budding Musicians
features: 【100% CHILD-SAFE XYLOPHONE】Quality metal and wood materials, the xylophone instrument has no chemical smell. The wood is perfectly smooth and the keys are tightly attached.
【DEVELOP MULTIPLE SKILLS】These keys have different sizes, colors and timbre. The sound is crisp and sweet when tapped, which can help children explore sound, color and stimulate creativity.

【CHILDREN-FRIENDLY DESIGN】The vivid a rainbow-color of notes can stimulate children' s vision while the easy-hold mallets allow kids use the glockenspiel simply and improve their hand control ability.

【EXCELLENT BIRTHDAYS/HOLIDAYS BABY GIFT】With portable design, fascinating appearance and awesome function, the xylophone toy is a perfect choice for birthday/holiday gift. Kids can play with this toy instrument indoors/outdoors for fun or learning.
【EASY TO TAKE AND STORE】The small size allows you to use it anywhere, and the hammer can be placed in the xylophone, so you don’t have to worry about losing it.
description: Product Description Natural Wooden Toddler Xylophone - An ideal beginner instrument for your future artists! Specifications: Material: Wine Wood + Aluminum Plate Xylophone Size: 24 x 8.4 cm Package Includes: 1 x Hand Held Xylophone 2 x Wooden Mallets Notice/Warning: Choking Hazard - Small parts may not be suitable for kids below 3 years old.
